ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cables" (
  "cable_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cable */,
  "shielded_type" TEXT /* Shielded type of the cable (e.g., YES, NO) */,
  "ferrite_core" TEXT /* Ferrite core type of the cable (e.g., YES, NO) */,
  "length" REAL /* Length of the cable in meters */,
  "cable_type" TEXT /* Type of cable (e.g., USB, RS232) */,
  "note" TEXT /* Note or description of the cable */,
  "cable_model" TEXT /* Model number or specific product code for the cable */,
  "connector_type" TEXT /* Type of connector (e.g., A, B, Mini, Micro) */,
  "max_current" REAL /* Maximum current the cable can handle */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material used in the cable (e.g., copper, aluminum) */,
  "bar_code" TEXT /* Barcode for the cable */,
  "rfid_tag" TEXT /* RFID tag for the cable */,
  "manufacture_date" TEXT /* Date of manufacture */,
  "expiry_date" TEXT /* Expiry date of the cable */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the supplier table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cable_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cables_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "warehouses" (
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each warehouse */,
  "warehouse_name" TEXT /* Name of the warehouse */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the warehouse */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the warehouse */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the user table, indicating the manager of the warehouse */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the warehouse */,
  "address" TEXT /* Detailed address of the warehouse */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum capacity of the warehouse in terms of number of cables */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the warehouse was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the warehouse was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("warehouse_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_warehouses_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory entry */,
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* ID of the warehouse storing the cables */,
  "cable_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cable type */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of cables in stock */,
  "location_within_warehouse" TEXT /* Specific location within the warehouse (e.g., aisle, section) */,
  "last_checked" TEXT /* Date and time the inventory was last checked */,
  "min_stock_level" INTEGER /* Minimum stock level to trigger a reorder */,
  "reorder_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity to reorder when stock falls below the minimum level */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the inventory (e.g., available, low, out of stock) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_warehouse_id FOREIGN KEY ("warehouse_id") REFERENCES warehouses ("warehouse_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_cable_id FOREIGN KEY ("cable_id") REFERENCES cables ("cable_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., warehouse manager, inventory specialist, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was last updated */,
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the warehouse table, indicating the warehouse the user is associated with */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_warehouse_id FOREIGN KEY ("warehouse_id") REFERENCES warehouses ("warehouse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the supplier */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the supplier */,
  "address" TEXT /* Detailed address of the supplier */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the supplier was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the supplier information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)
